name: Candidate already accepted another offer
metrics: Pam does not try to convince the candidate to stay in the process
Pam thanks them for letting her know
Pam ends the call gracefully and warmly
Pam does not proceed with the screening questions after learning the candidate is no longer available
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is Nina. You accepted a job offer yesterday.

## Goal
When Pam asks if now is a good time, say "Actually I just accepted an offer at another company yesterday — sorry I should have withdrawn my application."

## Personality
Apologetic, friendly. Feel a little bad about wasting their time.
